scripts.preflight: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.lint: turbo run lint && bun run scripts:lint
scripts.format: biome format --write . && bun run scripts:format && (cd apps/rust && cargo fmt) && (cd apps/c && bun run format) && (cd apps/fastapi && bun run format)
scripts.test: turbo run test && bun run test:scripts
scripts.test:coverage: (cd apps/web && bun run test:coverage) && (cd apps/hono-api && bun run test:coverage) && (cd packages/logger && bun run test:coverage) && (cd apps/mobile && bun run test) && (cd apps/rust && bun run test) && (cd apps/c && bun run test) && bun run test:scripts
scripts.test:scripts: bash scripts/bash/tests/main.test.sh && (command -v lua >/dev/null 2>&1 && lua scripts/lua/tests/main_test.lua || lua5.4 scripts/lua/tests/main_test.lua) && python -m unittest scripts/python/tests/test_main.py
scripts.ci:lint: bun run lint && bun run architecture:check
scripts.scripts:lint: shellcheck scripts/bash/*.sh scripts/git-hooks/*.sh && (luacheck scripts/lua 2>/dev/null || true) && (ruff check scripts/python 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.scripts:format: shfmt -i 4 -w scripts/bash/*.sh scripts/git-hooks/*.sh && (stylua scripts/lua 2>/dev/null || true) && (ruff format scripts/python 2>/dev/null || true)
